Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"type":"https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/cloudflare-1xxx-errors/error-1015/","title":"Error 1015: You are being rate limited","status":429,"detail":"You are being rate-limited by the website owner's configuration.","instance":"a1e8498e5867241b","error_code":1015,"error_name":"rate_limited","error_category":"rate_limit","ray_id":"a1e8498e5867241b","timestamp":"2026-07-21T06:53:13Z","zone":"stream.usefulapi.io","cloudflare_error":true,"retryable":true,"retry_after":30,"owner_action_required":false,"what_you_should_do":"**Wait and retry.** This block is transient. Wait at least 30 seconds, then retry with exponential backoff.

Recommended approach:
1. Wait 30 seconds before your next request
2. If rate-limited again, double the wait time (60s, 120s, etc.)
3. If rate-limiting persists after 5 retries, stop and reassess your request pattern","footer":"This error was generated by Cloudflare on behalf of the website owner."}
